title: Le sang à la tête
writer: Georges Simenon, Michel Audiard, Gilles Grangier
actors: Jean Gabin, Paul Frankeur, Claude Sylvain
plot: François Cardinaud is one of the richest shipowners in the region. But this success arouses resentment and jealousy. When Marthe, his wife, leaves the home without warning, Cardinaud sees her life cracking little by little.
